other_observers: Bill Maynard, Cici and Suke Lee.  Seen by landowners from Nov 1-Dec 4, 2013.
duration: 15 minutes total came in three times
description: A small hummingbird with purple on the throat.  Please see photos, all taken by me on 2 Decemer 2013.  The bird came into the feeders three times, and stayed for nice looks and photos.  The bird was found on 1 November 2013 by the caretakers of the private property.  The bird was seen by a few birders on 27 November 2013 (Bill Maynard, Jeannie Mitchell, and Mark Peterson).  A few more birders also saw the bird on 3 December 2013.  The bird came into the feeders again on 4 December 2013.  I think this was the last date the bird was seen in the wild, before the arctic cold front came.
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
